budgets.budget.autoadjustdata.CfnAbout: Determine the budget amount for an auto-adjusting budget.

budgets.budget.autoadjustdata.AutoAdjust.Description: The string that defines whether your budget auto-adjusts based on historical or forecasted data.

budgets.budget.autoadjustdata.Historical.Description: The parameters that define or describe the historical data that your auto-adjusting budget is based on.
